name: Qryptal Secure Code System (QSCS) API
description: Qryptal helps generate documents with secure, verifiable, tamper-proof, digitally signed QR codes. The QSCS API allows creating secure QR codes (PDC, EDC, and HDC types) with data, formatting, and optional file attachments.
